# godaddy_domains (Data Source)

List domains for the configured GoDaddy account.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `includes` (List of String) Optional includes like `contacts` or `nameServers`.
- `limit` (Number) Maximum number of domains to return.
- `marker` (String) Marker token for pagination.
- `modified_date` (String) Optional modified date filter.
- `status_groups` (List of String) Optional list of status groups.
- `statuses` (List of String) Optional list of statuses.

### Read-Only

- `domains` (List of Object) Domain summaries returned by GoDaddy. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--domains))

<a id="nestedatt--domains"></a>
### Nested Schema for `domains`

Read-Only:

- `created_at` (String)
- `domain` (String)
- `domain_id` (Number)
- `expires_at` (String)
- `name_servers` (List of String)
- `status` (String)
